comment: Expansion #4 Step-2 fan-out, shape A (dict->str). Transcribed verbatim from scraper_gorilla.py inline CALIBER_PATHS on 2026-06-14, parity-proven byte-identical before flip. Gorilla is a single-brand WooCommerce manufacturer that lists only 5 of the 10 tracked calibers (no .40 S&W / .38 Spl / .357 Mag / .22 LR / 7.62x39) — those are deliberately absent, not parked. Most slugs carry a '-view-ammo-by-caliber' suffix from a WP duplicate-slug rename; .308 Win and 9mm don't. Not yet harness-validated; validation null until Step-3. Approved by Jon, Step-2 fan-out, 2026-06-14.
